tagline: Hair, color, skin & spa in the heart of Sebastopol
seoDescription: Lily's Salon in Sebastopol, CA is a full-service hair and day spa owned by Lisa Houston. Expert cuts, color, balayage, facials and waxing using Eufora and Olaplex. Call (707) 824-1075.
heroHeading: A salon Sebastopol has trusted for years
heroSubheading: Owner-led haircuts, color, facials and waxing from a tight-knit team of artists who know your hair by name.
highlights: Owned and operated by Lisa Houston, a hair artist and colorist in the craft since 1985
Full-service salon and day spa: hair, color, facials, waxing and makeup under one roof
Balayage, highlights, tint and corrective color, plus Olaplex and Malibu treatments
Naturally inspired Eufora products chosen for the health and nourishment of your hair
A relaxed, welcoming chair where clients stay loyal for 15 and 20 years
aboutHeading: Meet Lisa and the Lily's family
aboutBody: Lily's Salon is a full-service salon and day spa in Sebastopol, owned and operated by Lisa Houston. Lisa has worked in the creative field since 1985 and sharpened her craft through advanced training with Vidal Sassoon, Toni & Guy, Pivot Point, Gary Gerrard, Wella Professional Hair Color and Eufora Concepts. She treats every client as a new canvas, listening carefully to what you want before she ever picks up the shears — which is why so many of her clients have followed her for well over a decade.

Behind the chairs is a small, talented team. Clara Marlow brings eighteen years of cutting and color expertise; Eliana Ponek lives for creating bold, exciting color. On the skin-care side, estheticians Nancy Giacobbe of Belladonna Skin Care and Amber Burke of Amber Rose Skin Care round out the spa menu with facials and waxing. The salon leans on naturally inspired Eufora products and a warm, unhurried atmosphere, so a visit feels less like an appointment and more like catching up with people who genuinely care how you look and feel.

services.title: Cuts & Styling
services.description: Precision haircuts for adults and kids, clipper cuts, bang trims, blow-dry styles and special-occasion up-dos, shaped to your hair and how you actually wear it.

services.title: Color & Balayage
services.description: Single-process tint, partial and full highlights, hand-painted balayage and custom toners — natural, sun-kissed dimension or a bold new direction, done with care.

services.title: Hair Health Treatments
services.description: Olaplex to repair broken bonds, Malibu to clear mineral build-up, and deep-conditioning treatments using naturally inspired Eufora products for stronger, healthier hair.

services.title: Facials & Skin Care
services.description: From the Signature and Mini facial to anti-aging, acne and ultra-pampering treatments and Jan Marini peels, delivered by licensed estheticians Nancy and Amber.

services.title: Waxing & Hair Removal
services.description: Brow, lip and full-face waxing, underarm, bikini, custom and Brazilian, and lower, upper or full-leg waxing — clean, meticulous and comfortable.

services.title: Perms & Specialty
services.description: Perms and finishing touches, plus makeup and a curated shelf of Eufora products to keep your color and style looking salon-fresh between visits.

testimonials.quote: We're so lucky to have such amazing local talent at LiLy's Salon.

notes: Researched 2026-06-23 from the business's own site (lilyssaloninsebastopol.com home, /about-us, /services, /testimonials, /contact-us), Yelp (lilys-salon-and-day-spa-sebastopol, 17 reviews) and Facebook (facebook.com/lilys.sebastopol). VERIFIED: owner Lisa Houston (in the creative field since 1985; trained with Vidal Sassoon, Toni & Guy, Pivot Point, Gary Gerrard, Wella, Eufora); full-service hair + day spa; team Clara Marlow, Eliana Ponek, Nancy Giacobbe (Belladonna Skin Care), Amber Burke (Amber Rose Skin Care); services = cuts, color/balayage/highlights, Olaplex/Malibu/deep conditioning, facials, Jan Marini peels, waxing, perms; Eufora product line. Testimonials are pulled verbatim from the salon's own /testimonials page. ESTABLISHED left blank: sources conflict (one summary said 'open 18 years' ~2008, another said 'established 2004') and the site states no founding year — multiple long-tenure clients (15-20 yrs) and 'since it opened' reviews confirm long history, so prose says 'years'/'over a decade' rather than a specific year. HOURS left blank: the official Contact page lists no by-day hours; day-by-day hours only appeared on an aggregator (Loc8NearMe), unverified. Confirmed this is THE Sebastopol salon at 145 Pleasant Hill Ave N, Ste 101, (707) 824-1075.
